creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
Since Oracle obtained OpenOffice when I use it, it lags badly (LibreOffice is no different since it was forked from OOO about v3.3.0). If I remember correctly OpenOffice 3.2.1 worked quite well, but now, first time some dialogues shows up, it takes at least 5 minutes before I can use office again.

Also problems when importing Micro$oft Office documents, office also freezes from some time

P.S. This is similar PR to what I just submitted about OpenOffice. That's because bough offices are struggling same thing

How-To-Repeat: Open write for example, write some text, and then select some text, right click, select "Character".... 
wuala
Office is doing something mysteriously.

Note, this happens when you first time do some action, later it's seams all normal.
But it's annoying as hell
